tasks.title: Two Sum
tasks.description: Classic hash map problem. Understand O(n) vs O(n²) approach.

tasks.title: Install Docker & run first container
tasks.description: Install Docker Desktop. Run hello-world. Run nginx. Understand images vs containers.

tasks.title: Valid Anagram
tasks.description: Sort approach vs hash map approach. Practice thinking about trade-offs out loud.

tasks.title: Write your first Dockerfile
tasks.description: Containerise an existing Node/Express project. Understand FROM, COPY, RUN, CMD.

tasks.title: Contains Duplicate
tasks.description: Use a Set. Understand space vs time trade-off. Very fast solve — aim for under 15 min.

tasks.title: Docker Compose — multi-container app
tasks.description: Run Node app + Postgres together using docker-compose.yml. Push to GitHub.

tasks.title: Group Anagrams
tasks.description: Hash map with sorted string as key. Medium difficulty — spend full 45 min.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions — basic CI pipeline
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml. Run lint + build on every push. Badge on README.

tasks.title: Binary Search
tasks.description: Master the template. Left/right pointer. Avoid off-by-one errors. Solve 3 variants.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions — deploy to server on merge
tasks.description: Extend CI with CD step. SSH into server and pull latest Docker image on main merge.

tasks.title: Two Sum II (sorted array)
tasks.description: Two pointer pattern. No extra space allowed. Classic intro to the pattern.

tasks.title: AWS account setup + IAM basics
tasks.description: Create AWS account. Set up IAM user (never use root). Understand regions and AZs.

tasks.title: 3Sum
tasks.description: Two pointers inside a loop. Sort first. Skip duplicates carefully. Classic medium.

tasks.title: Docker image to AWS ECR
tasks.description: Build Docker image. Tag and push to Amazon ECR. Understand private registries.

tasks.title: Container With Most Water
tasks.description: Greedy two pointer. Understand WHY moving the smaller pointer is correct.

tasks.title: Nginx reverse proxy in Docker
tasks.description: Use Nginx as reverse proxy in docker-compose. Route /api to backend, / to frontend.

tasks.title: Best Time to Buy & Sell Stock
tasks.description: Sliding window / greedy. Track min price seen so far. Very common interview question.

tasks.title: Launch EC2 instance + SSH in
tasks.description: Launch t2.micro. Configure security group. SSH in. Install Node. Deploy your app manually.

tasks.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
tasks.description: Sliding window with a set. Expand right, shrink left. Classic medium.

tasks.title: AWS S3 — upload & serve files
tasks.description: Create S3 bucket. Upload files via SDK. Set bucket policy. Generate pre-signed URLs.

tasks.title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
tasks.description: Sliding window. Track max frequency char. The (window - maxFreq > k) condition is the key insight.

tasks.title: AWS RDS — managed Postgres
tasks.description: Launch RDS Postgres instance. Connect from local. Connect from EC2. Understand security groups for DB access.

tasks.title: Valid Parentheses
tasks.description: Stack-based. Push open brackets, pop on close. Handle edge cases like empty stack.

tasks.title: AWS Load Balancer + Auto Scaling
tasks.description: Set up ALB in front of EC2. Configure target group. Enable Auto Scaling Group with min 1 max 3.

tasks.title: Reverse Linked List
tasks.description: Iterative AND recursive. Must know both. Draw pointer manipulation on paper first.

tasks.title: AWS Lambda — serverless functions
tasks.description: Write first Lambda in Node.js. Trigger via API Gateway. Understand cold starts and execution context.

tasks.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
tasks.description: Dummy head trick. Compare values, link nodes. Handle remaining nodes after loop.

tasks.title: Serverless Framework + deploy
tasks.description: Use Serverless Framework to define and deploy Lambda + API Gateway from YAML config.

tasks.title: Linked List Cycle
tasks.description: Floyd's tortoise and hare. Slow & fast pointer. Classic O(1) space solution.

tasks.title: AWS CloudWatch — logs & metrics
tasks.description: Set up CloudWatch log groups. Create metric alarms. Monitor Lambda invocations and errors.

tasks.title: Reorder List
tasks.description: Find middle (slow/fast), reverse second half, merge. Three steps — practice each separately.

tasks.title: Month 1 review + LinkedIn post
tasks.description: Review Docker, CI/CD, AWS concepts. Write a LinkedIn post about something you learned. Update your GitHub README.

weeks.theme: AI Engineering — OpenAI + Vercel AI SDK

tasks.title: Invert Binary Tree
tasks.description: Recursive swap. Understand recursion depth. Also do iteratively with a queue (BFS).

tasks.title: Vercel AI SDK — build a basic chat UI
tasks.description: Set up Next.js app with Vercel AI SDK. Stream responses. Build a simple chat interface with useChat hook.

tasks.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
tasks.description: DFS recursive (1 line!). Also do BFS level-order. Both approaches are interview valid.

tasks.title: LLM concepts — tokens, context window, temperature
tasks.description: Understand how LLMs work at a practical level. Tokens, embeddings, temperature, top-p. You'll be asked this in interviews.

tasks.title: Same Tree
tasks.description: Recursive comparison. Handle null cases first. Simple but great for practicing tree recursion.

tasks.title: LangChain.js — chains and prompt templates
tasks.description: Build a basic chain. Understand PromptTemplate, LLMChain, output parsers. Connect to OpenAI or Anthropic.

tasks.title: Subtree of Another Tree
tasks.description: Use sameTree helper. Call it at every node. Understand O(n*m) complexity.

tasks.title: OpenAI function calling / tool use
tasks.description: Implement function calling. Pass tools to the model. Parse structured JSON responses. Build a real use case.

tasks.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of BST
tasks.description: Use BST property: go left if both < root, right if both > root, else found LCA.

tasks.title: Build a RAG pipeline from scratch
tasks.description: Chunk documents. Generate embeddings with OpenAI. Store in Pinecone/Supabase. Retrieve & inject into prompt.

tasks.title: Kth Smallest Element in BST
tasks.description: In-order traversal gives sorted order in BST. Stop at kth element. Iterative stack approach.

tasks.title: Vector embeddings — understand & visualise
tasks.description: Generate embeddings. Compute cosine similarity. Use UMAP to visualise. Understand semantic search fundamentally.

tasks.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
tasks.description: BFS with a queue. Track level boundaries with inner loop on queue size. Very common.

tasks.title: Supabase pgvector — vector DB in Postgres
tasks.description: Enable pgvector extension. Store embeddings in Postgres. Run similarity search with cosine distance.

tasks.title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder
tasks.description: Hard but important. Root is preorder[0]. Find in inorder to split left/right subtree.

tasks.title: Deploy AI app to Vercel + env secrets
tasks.description: Deploy RAG chat app to Vercel. Configure environment variables securely. Set up edge runtime if needed.

tasks.title: Number of Islands
tasks.description: DFS/BFS on a grid. Mark visited cells. Count connected components. Classic graph problem.

tasks.title: Kubernetes concepts — pods, nodes, clusters
tasks.description: Understand K8s architecture. Pods, Deployments, Services, Namespaces. Install minikube locally.

tasks.title: Clone Graph
tasks.description: BFS/DFS + hash map to avoid cycles. The visited map maps old node → new node.

tasks.title: Write Kubernetes YAML — Deployment + Service
tasks.description: Write Deployment YAML for your Node app. Expose via ClusterIP Service. Apply with kubectl.

tasks.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
tasks.description: Multi-source BFS/DFS from edges. Run twice (Pacific, Atlantic). Intersect results.

tasks.title: Kubernetes — ConfigMaps & Secrets
tasks.description: Store app config in ConfigMap. Store DB passwords in Secrets. Mount both as env vars in pods.

tasks.title: Course Schedule
tasks.description: Topological sort / cycle detection in directed graph. BFS (Kahn's algo) or DFS with states.

tasks.title: Kubernetes — Ingress + Horizontal Pod Autoscaler
tasks.description: Set up Nginx Ingress controller. Route traffic. Configure HPA to scale pods on CPU usage.

weeks.theme: System Design Basics + Heap & Priority Queue

tasks.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
tasks.description: Min-heap of size k. QuickSelect O(n) average. Know both approaches for interviews.

tasks.title: System design — URL shortener
tasks.description: Design bit.ly from scratch. Hash function, redirect, DB schema, caching layer, scale to millions.

tasks.title: Find Median from Data Stream
tasks.description: Two heaps: max-heap (left half) + min-heap (right half). Balance after each insert.

tasks.title: System design — design Twitter feed
tasks.description: Fan-out vs pull model. Newsfeed generation. CDN for media. Redis for timeline cache.

tasks.title: Task Scheduler
tasks.description: Max-heap + cooldown. Greedy: always pick most frequent available task. Calculate idle time.

tasks.title: CAP theorem + consistency patterns
tasks.description: Understand CAP theorem. Strong vs eventual consistency. ACID vs BASE. Where MongoDB/Postgres fit.

tasks.title: Design Twitter (simplified)
tasks.description: OOP + heap. postTweet, getNewsFeed, follow/unfollow. Min-heap merges k sorted feeds.

tasks.title: Load balancing + rate limiting deep dive
tasks.description: Round robin vs least connections. Token bucket vs leaky bucket rate limiting. Implement basic rate limiter in Express.

tasks.title: Climbing Stairs
tasks.description: Your first DP problem. See the Fibonacci pattern. Solve with recursion first, then memoization, then bottom-up.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL indexing — understand EXPLAIN ANALYZE
tasks.description: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on slow queries. Create indexes. See the difference. Understand B-tree vs Hash index.

tasks.title: House Robber
tasks.description: DP. rob[i] = max(rob[i-2] + nums[i], rob[i-1]). Can reduce to 2 variables.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL — window functions & CTEs
tasks.description: RANK, ROW_NUMBER, LAG, LEAD. Write complex analytics queries using CTEs. Real use cases.

tasks.title: Coin Change
tasks.description: Bottom-up DP. dp[i] = min coins to make amount i. Classic unbounded knapsack variant.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL — full text search + GIN indexes
tasks.description: tsvector, tsquery, to_tsvector. Create GIN index for fast full text search. Real search endpoint.

tasks.title: Longest Common Subsequence
tasks.description: 2D DP grid. if chars match: dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1]+1 else max of adjacent. Build table.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL — partitioning + vacuuming
tasks.description: Partition large tables by date range. Understand autovacuum. Run VACUUM ANALYZE. Monitor bloat.

tasks.title: Word Break
tasks.description: DP. dp[i] = true if s[0:i] can be segmented. Iterate from j=0 to i, check dp[j] + s[j:i] in wordDict.

tasks.title: Redis fundamentals — data structures & use cases
tasks.description: String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set. When to use each. Run Redis in Docker. Use redis-cli.

tasks.title: Unique Paths
tasks.description: 2D DP or combinatorics. dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j] + dp[i][j-1]. Base case: top row & left col = 1.

tasks.title: Redis caching layer for Express API
tasks.description: Add Redis caching to your Express API. Cache GET responses. Invalidate on mutations. ioredis library.

tasks.title: Decode Ways
tasks.description: DP. dp[i] depends on dp[i-1] (1-digit) and dp[i-2] (2-digit). Handle '0' edge cases carefully.

tasks.title: Redis pub/sub — real-time notifications
tasks.description: Implement pub/sub with Redis. Publisher service, subscriber service. Build a real-time notification system.

tasks.title: Maximum Product Subarray
tasks.description: Track both max and min at each step (negatives can flip sign). DP with two variables.

tasks.title: Redis — session management + rate limiting
tasks.description: Replace JWT in-memory store with Redis. Implement sliding window rate limiting using Redis sorted sets.

tasks.title: Subsets
tasks.description: Backtracking. At each step: include or exclude. Draw decision tree. O(2^n) solutions.

tasks.title: Microservices — split monolith into services
tasks.description: Take your existing app. Extract auth service, user service, product service. Define boundaries clearly.

tasks.title: Combination Sum
tasks.description: Backtracking. Reuse elements allowed. Prune by checking remaining < 0. Avoid duplicates by index.

tasks.title: gRPC — service-to-service communication
tasks.description: Define .proto file. Generate TypeScript types. Build gRPC server + client. Replace REST between services.

tasks.title: Permutations
tasks.description: Backtracking. Swap elements in-place. Or use a used[] boolean array. Generate all n! permutations.

tasks.title: Message queues — RabbitMQ or Bull/BullMQ
tasks.description: Add async job queue to your microservices. Process emails, notifications, reports asynchronously.

tasks.title: N-Queens
tasks.description: Classic backtracking. Track attacked rows/cols/diagonals with sets. Place queen, recurse, remove.

tasks.title: Distributed tracing — OpenTelemetry
tasks.description: Add OpenTelemetry to each service. Export traces to Jaeger. Trace a request across 3 services end-to-end.

tasks.title: Mock Interview #1 — Easy+Medium set
tasks.description: Timed session: 2 easy + 1 medium in 60 min. No hints. Write clean code with comments. Review after.

tasks.title: System design — design WhatsApp / real-time chat
tasks.description: WebSockets vs long polling. Message delivery guarantees. Online presence. Media storage. Scale to 1B users.

tasks.title: Mock Interview #2 — Medium set
tasks.description: 2 medium problems in 60 min. Explain approach before coding. Think out loud. Simulate real interview.

tasks.title: System design — design Netflix / video streaming
tasks.description: CDN for video delivery. Adaptive bitrate streaming. Content ingestion pipeline. Recommendation engine.

tasks.title: Mock Interview #3 — Mixed difficulty
tasks.description: 1 easy + 2 medium OR 1 hard in 75 min. Pick problems you haven't seen. Realistic pressure.

tasks.title: Portfolio & GitHub polish sprint
tasks.description: Update GitHub READMEs with architecture diagrams. Pin 3 best repos. Add live demo links. Update LinkedIn with skills.

tasks.title: Final review — weak spots
tasks.description: Revisit any problems you got wrong. Re-solve without looking. Write time/space complexity for each.

tasks.title: 3-month retrospective + Month 4 planning
tasks.description: Review what you built. Write a LinkedIn post about your 3-month journey. Plan next 3 months: what's missing?
